name: get_itinerary
description: Retrieve the current booking itinerary and status for the active session. Call this first in Act 2 to know what was booked and what is now broken.

session_id.description: The session/PNR session to retrieve. If unknown, pass 'active'.

notes: Read-only. VB agent calls this directly — no LangGraph round-trip needed.

name: propose_recovery
description: Ask the brain to assess the disruption and return a proposed recovery plan (new flight options, updated hotel/car windows). Must be called before any leg approval.

name: search_flights
description: Search for available replacement flights given the disrupted leg. Returns options the agent will present to the traveler.

name: record_choice
description: Record the traveler's selection for a leg (flight, hotel, or car). Must be called after the traveler says yes to a specific option.

query.description: The traveler's exact approval utterance (e.g. '6:05' or 'go ahead').

name: search_hotels
description: Search for available hotels on the new dates after the flight is rebooked.

name: search_cars
description: Search for available car rentals on the new dates.

name: call_hotel
description: Place a nested outbound call to the hotel to modify the reservation. Only call this AFTER the traveler has explicitly approved the hotel change AND you have told them you are putting them on hold.
notes: 300s window covers the nested VB call. Traveler must be on hold before calling.

name: commit_itinerary
description: Write the final rebooked itinerary to Sabre and emit the confirmation. Only call after all three leg approvals are recorded.

name: get_booking_context
description: Hotel agent only: retrieve the booking context to know which reservation to modify. Call this first.
notes: Keyed by callee phone number on the server. Hotel agent pulls context rather than receiving it at call start.
